description: It's all about walking and running healthy with the skechers Resistance Runner Prospeed shoe. Packed with technological features this shoe adjusts to your every stride so that every step your take naturally aligns with the body's centre of gravity and promotes fluid movement. Upper Mesh upper upper with synthetic leather overlays for lightweight comfort and breathability Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Cushioned tongue and collar with a fabric inner lining Exoskin support sock-fit construction for absolute comfort Brand tab on tongue and heel Midsole Resalyte for cushioned comfort and enhanced impact protection Outsole High density rubber outsole with SmartShoe and Mid-Foot Strike technology to guide your body into position and transform impact into elastic energy, offering an efficient stride Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
